title: cota lyonnetioides
intro:
Cota lyonnetioides, also known as Lyonnet's Cota, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its annual or biennial growth habit and small yellow or white flowers.

The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular remedy for various health issues.

The health benefits of Cota lyonnetioides include relief from menstrual cramps, nausea, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health.

Cota lyonnetioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, or used topically in the form of creams or ointments to treat skin conditions.
